metaDescription: Explore current paid and volunteer vacancies at Dove Cottage Day Hospice, including downloadable role information.
heroImageAlt: Dove Cottage charity shop frontage and signage
heroShortDescription: Our current paid and volunteer roles — learn more and apply.
introMarkdown:
Our current vacancies are listed below (including both paid roles and volunteer roles).

If you would like to be considered for future roles that may become available, please do send us an email with a copy of your CV for us to keep on file to admin@dovecottage.org
volunteerIntroMarkdown:
In order to run Dove Cottage we rely heavily on a base of willing volunteers, who selflessly donate their time to help support in all aspects of the charity. If you would like to offer your time to help with a role that is not being actively promoted, please do get in touch!

Please contact us on 01949 860303 / admin@dovecottage.org for more information, or you can download a Volunteer Application Form and apply straight away!
formHintMarkdown: When you’re ready, use the form below to send your details. (A branded form embed will be added here soon.)

paidRoles.title: Sales Assistant (Saturdays)
paidRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To assist the shop manager in managing all aspects of the operational running of the charity shop and promote the work of Dove Cottage Day Hospice.
paidRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
paidRoles.contactMarkdown: For more information or to arrange an informal chat about the role please contact Tim at the hospice via email tim@dovecottage.org

volunteerRoles.title: Hairdresser
volunteerRoles.workingHours: Various days (Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday) Please enquire to find out specific availability
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To provide a gentle and compassionate hairdressing service to our hospice guests and carers. We’re looking for an experienced, friendly and reliable hairdresser to offer simple haircuts, styling and blow‑dries in our on‑site salon space. Experience and relevant qualifications are essential. Please contact us for more details and an informal chat.
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email admin@dovecottage.org to request more details

volunteerRoles.title: Chaplaincy support
volunteerRoles.workingHours: Various days (Monday/Wednesday/Thursday) Please enquire to find out specific availability
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To provide emotional support to hospice guests in a multi-faith setting.
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email admin@dovecottage.org to request more details

volunteerRoles.title: Pets as Therapy
volunteerRoles.workingHours: Various days (Monday – Thursday) Ad-hoc visits, not set days.
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To visit the hospice with your animal companion, to enhance our wellbeing provision for our guests and create smiles and laughter. NB: official PAT registered animals are preferred, however we can accommodate other animals too – please contact us to discuss.
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email admin@dovecottage.org to request more details

volunteerRoles.title: Dementia Support
volunteerRoles.workingHours: Various days (Monday – Thursday) Ad-hoc visits, not set days.
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To support our nursing team with visiting families out in the community to offer social support to individuals to enable their carer some respite. Previous experience is preferred but not essential as full training will be provided.
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email admin@dovecottage.org to request more details

volunteerRoles.title: Crafts & Wellbeing support
volunteerRoles.workingHours: Various days (Monday – Thursday) Ad-hoc visits, not set days.
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To coordinate and lead various activities to enhance our wellbeing provision for our guests and carers. Experience and interests in a wide range of crafts is preferable, but specific interests are also welcomed!
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email admin@dovecottage.org to request more details

volunteerRoles.title: Shop Assistant
volunteerRoles.workingHours: Various days (Monday – Saturday) Please enquire to find out specific availability
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To support the shop managers at our Cotgrave charity shop, sorting donations, steaming clothes, restocking, pricing items for sale, using the till and handling customer enquiries.
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email admin@dovecottage.org to request more details

volunteerRoles.title: Fundraising & Events support
volunteerRoles.roleOverviewMarkdown: To assist the fundraising team at various community events throughout the year. Supporting with set-up/breakdown of stands where required and promoting the hospice services to the wider community.
volunteerRoles.pdfLabel: Download more information about the role here
volunteerRoles.contactMarkdown: Please email fundraising@dovecottage.org to request more details
